# Windsanity HVAC

> Veteran-owned ductless mini split installation company serving all of Texas. Specializing in garage cooling, workshops, and spaces without existing ductwork.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://windsanityhvac.com/): Service overview, free quote request, and installation information for ductless mini splits in Texas.

## Blog Posts

- [How to Cool a Garage in Texas](https://windsanityhvac.com/blog/how-to-cool-garage-texas.html): Complete guide to garage cooling options in Texas heat, including mini split installation.
- [Ductless Mini Split Garage Installation](https://windsanityhvac.com/blog/ductless-mini-split-garage-installation-texas.html): Expert guide to ductless mini split installation for Texas garages.
